candidates.why: Exact match for total current assets on the balance sheet.

candidates.why: Only a component of current assets, not the total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current assets line.

candidates.why: Exact balance-sheet cash and cash equivalents line.
Appears to be a component/detail rather than the main total.
Restricted cash should generally be excluded from CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at end of the period
candidates.why: Cash flow statement endpoint agrees numerically, but balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

variables.notes: Chose the balance-sheet cash total; excluded restricted cash.

candidates.why: Exact match for total current liabilities.

candidates.row_label: Trade payables and other current liabilities
candidates.why: Component/subtotal of current liabilities, not the full total.
Balancing line, not a reported total.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total current liabilities line.

candidates.why: Appears in the current-liabilities section and is a financing-related current debt line.
Also appears in the current-liabilities section in some years, suggesting a current borrowing component.
Would be an ideal STD label, but no values are shown in preview.

variables.notes: Chose current-section borrowing lines as the minimal identifiable short-term debt components. Excluded lease-related rows. Did not use the lower noncurrent-section labels with similar names.

candidates.why: Exact match for taxes payable/current tax liability.
Closest reported balance-sheet PPE net line and likely the main PP&E presentation in some years.
Also a PP&E net line and may represent the renamed main PP&E category in some years.
PP&E component but not the full PPE total.

variables.notes: No explicit total property, plant and equipment line is visible. Selected the closest net PPE labels as a priority list because presentation appears to change over time, but coverage of total PPE is somewhat ambiguous.

candidates.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
candidates.why: Exact match for operating cash flow.

final_choice.row_label: Net cash flow from operating activities
